info.title: OpenEMIS Core API V4
info.description: The [OpenEMIS](https://www.openemis.org/) initiative aims to deploy a high-quality Education Management Information System (EMIS) designed to collect and report data on schools, students, teachers and staff. The system was conceived by `UNESCO` to be a royalty-free system that can be easily customized to meet the specific needs of member countries.

get.summary: Get details of a specific exam
get.description: Returns details of the exam identified by the provided examId

get.summary: Get students for a specific exam, centre, and subject
get.description: Returns details of students enrolled in a specific exam, centre, and subject based on the provided parameters.

requestBody.description: Parameters for retrieving student subject result

marks.description: Mark is required only if examination_grading_option_id is null.

get.summary: Get scanned user listing
get.description: Endpoint to retrieve scanned user listing with optional filters.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter records up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to retrieve per page.

400.description: Invalid request. Missing or invalid parameters.

500.description: Server error while processing the request.

error.example: An error occurred while retrieving the scanned user listing.

post.description: Endpoint for submitting scanned data with location, timestamp, and scanner details.

datetime.description: Timestamp of the scan in ISO 8601 format

access.description: Access level or type of scan

400.description: Invalid request. Required fields are missing or invalid.

get.summary: Retrieve scanned data by OpenEMIS number
get.description: Endpoint to fetch scanned data based on the provided OpenEMIS number.

get.summary: Export scanned data

parameters.name: openemis_no
parameters.description: OpenEMIS identification number to filter scanned data.

400.description: Invalid request. Missing or invalid parameters.

500.description: Server error while processing the export.

schema.example:
<xf:instance id='xform'>
     *                              <oe:SurveyForms id='19'>
     *                                  <oe:Institutions>P1002</oe:Institutions>
     *                                  <oe:AcademicPeriods>33</oe:AcademicPeriods>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='107' />
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='106'>-122.083922 37.4220936</oe:SurveyQuestions>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='7'>10</oe:SurveyQuestions>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='14'>3</oe:SurveyQuestions>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='9'>
     *                                      <oe:SurveyTableRows id='95'>
     *                                          <oe:SurveyTableColumns0 id='0'>test row</oe:SurveyTableColumns0>
     *                                      </oe:SurveyTableRows>
     *                                  </oe:SurveyQuestions>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='103'>0.2</oe:SurveyQuestions>
     *                                  <oe:SurveyQuestions id='112'>
     *                                      <oe:RepeatBlock>
     *                                          <oe:SurveyQuestions1 id='7'>5</oe:SurveyQuestions1>
